jobs.name: health-check
jobs.description: Check if the primary API is responding with 200 OK

jobs.name: disk-usage
jobs.description: Check disk usage and alert if above 85%

task.command: echo 'Filesystem      Size  Used Avail Use%' && echo '/dev/sda1       50G   32G   18G  64%' && echo 'Disk usage: 64%'

jobs.name: uptime-check
jobs.description: Report system uptime and load average

task.command: echo 'System uptime: 42 days, 7:23' && echo 'Load average: 0.42 0.38 0.35' && echo 'Memory: 2048MB/4096MB (50%)' && echo 'Status: healthy'

assertions.message: System is not in healthy state

jobs.name: ssl-cert-check
jobs.description: Verify SSL certificates have not expired

jobs.name: api-latency-test
jobs.description: Measure API response latency (must be < 2s)

jobs.name: dns-resolution
jobs.description: Verify DNS resolves correctly for all production domains

task.command: echo 'Resolving api.example.com... 93.184.216.34 (OK)' && echo 'Resolving cdn.example.com... 93.184.216.35 (OK)' && echo 'All 2 domains resolved successfully'

jobs.name: cache-hit-rate
jobs.description: Monitor cache hit rate and extract metrics

task.command: echo 'Cache stats:' && echo '  Hits: 14,823' && echo '  Misses: 912' && echo '  Hit rate: 94.2%' && echo '  Evictions: 47'

jobs.name: etl-extract
jobs.description: Extract raw data from source databases and APIs

task.command: echo 'Connecting to source DB...' && echo 'Extracted 1523 records from 4 tables'

jobs.name: etl-transform
jobs.description: Transform and normalize extracted data using parallel workers

task.command: echo 'Transforming {{LAST_ETL_COUNT}} records with {{ETL_WORKERS}} workers...' && sleep 1 && echo 'Transform complete'

jobs.name: etl-validate
jobs.description: Run data quality checks on transformed data

task.command: echo 'Validating {{LAST_ETL_COUNT}} records...' && echo 'null_check: passed' && echo 'schema_check: passed' && echo 'Validation complete: 0 errors'

jobs.name: etl-load
jobs.description: Load validated data into the analytics warehouse

task.command: echo 'Loading data into warehouse...' && echo 'Load complete: {{LAST_ETL_COUNT}} records'

jobs.name: etl-archive
jobs.description: Archive raw source files to cold storage after successful load

task.command: echo 'Archiving source files...' && echo 'Compressed 4 files (23MB -> 8MB)' && echo 'Archive complete'

jobs.name: etl-failure-alert
jobs.description: Send alert when any ETL stage fails

task.command: echo 'ETL ALERT: Pipeline failure detected'

jobs.name: deploy-staging
jobs.description: Deploy latest build to staging environment

task.command: echo 'Deploying to staging...' && sleep 2 && echo 'version=2.4.1' && echo 'Deploy complete'

jobs.name: deploy-smoke-test
jobs.description: Run smoke tests against staging deployment

task.command: echo 'Running smoke tests...' && echo 'GET /health: 200 OK' && echo 'All smoke tests passed'

jobs.name: deploy-production
jobs.description: Deploy to production (requires manual approval)

task.command: echo 'Deploying {{DEPLOY_VERSION}} to production...' && sleep 3 && echo 'Production deploy complete'

jobs.name: deploy-post-checks
jobs.description: Run post-deployment health checks

task.command: echo 'Post-deploy verification...' && echo 'Error rate: 0.02%' && echo 'P99 latency: 245ms' && echo 'All post-deploy checks passed'

jobs.name: deploy-notify
jobs.description: Notify team on Slack after production deploy

task.command: echo 'DEPLOY NOTIFICATION: {{DEPLOY_VERSION}} deployed to production'

jobs.name: db-backup
jobs.description: Full database backup with compression and checksum

task.command: echo 'Starting backup...' && sleep 1 && echo 'Backed up 524MB -> 142MB' && echo 'Backup complete: 142MB'

jobs.name: log-rotate
jobs.description: Rotate, compress, and archive old log files

task.command: echo 'Rotating logs...' && echo 'Compressed 3 files, freed 694MB'

jobs.name: cache-purge
jobs.description: Clear stale cache entries and rebuild hot cache

task.command: echo 'Purging cache entries older than 24h...' && echo 'Removed 847 entries (12MB freed)' && echo 'New hit rate: 96.1%'

jobs.name: db-vacuum
jobs.description: Run VACUUM and ANALYZE on database tables

task.command: echo 'Running VACUUM on 4 tables...' && echo 'Total space reclaimed: 146MB'

jobs.name: monthly-report
jobs.description: Generate monthly business metrics report on the 1st

task.command: echo 'Generating report for {{REPORT_MONTH}}...' && echo 'Revenue: $142,300' && echo 'Users: 8,421' && echo 'Report saved'

jobs.name: quarterly-audit
jobs.description: Run quarterly compliance audit (2 days before quarter end)

task.command: echo 'Running compliance audit...' && echo 'Access control: PASSED' && echo 'Data retention: PASSED' && echo 'Encryption: PASSED' && echo 'Audit complete: 3/3 checks passed'

jobs.name: weekly-digest
jobs.description: Compile weekly ops digest every Monday morning

task.command: echo 'Weekly digest: Jobs=342, Success=98.5%, Avg=12s'

jobs.name: sla-report
jobs.description: Generate SLA compliance report on the 15th

task.command: echo 'SLA Report: API uptime 99.97%, P99 312ms, Error rate 0.03%' && echo 'All SLA targets met'

jobs.name: sync-users
jobs.description: Sync user directory from corporate LDAP

task.command: echo 'Fetched 234 users. Updated: 12, Added: 3, Deactivated: 1. User sync complete'

jobs.name: sync-inventory
jobs.description: Pull latest product inventory from vendor API

jobs.name: sync-reconcile
jobs.description: Reconcile local data against vendor source and flag mismatches

task.command: echo 'Matched: 1,847 items. Mismatched: 3 items. Reconciliation complete'

jobs.name: sync-notify
jobs.description: Send sync summary to data team

task.command: echo 'Data sync pipeline complete. Sent to data-team@example.com'

jobs.name: sync-metrics
jobs.description: Update sync metrics dashboard and detect drift trends

task.command: echo 'Sync latency: 23s (p50), 45s (p99). Drift rate: 0.16%. Metrics pushed to Grafana'

jobs.name: vuln-scan
jobs.description: Run vulnerability scan on container images

task.command: echo 'Scanning 12 images...' && echo 'Scan complete: 0 critical, 3 high, 12 medium'

jobs.name: secret-rotation
jobs.description: Rotate API keys and database credentials monthly

task.command: echo '3 credentials rotated successfully'

jobs.name: access-audit
jobs.description: Audit active API keys and detect anomalous access patterns

task.command: echo 'Active keys: 14. Unused >30d: 2. Anomalous: 0. Access audit passed'

jobs.name: security-alert
jobs.description: React to security events and escalate

task.command: echo 'SECURITY ALERT: Escalating to security team'

jobs.name: slack-on-failure
jobs.description: Send Slack notification on any job failure

task.command: echo 'Sending failure notification to #alerts'

jobs.name: pagerduty-critical
jobs.description: Page on-call when health-check fails

task.command: echo 'PAGING ON-CALL: Critical failure. PagerDuty incident INC-4821'

jobs.name: daily-summary
jobs.description: Send daily execution summary to management

task.command: echo 'Daily Summary: 87 executions, 96.6% success, avg 8.4s'
